name: CI
on:
  - push
  - pull_request
jobs:
  Linux:
    strategy:
      fail-fast: false
      matrix:
        include:
          - jdk: 6
          - jdk: 7
          - jdk: 8
          - jdk: 8
            ecj: true
          - jdk: 9
          - jdk: 10
          - jdk: 11
          - jdk: 11
            ecj: true
          - jdk: 12
          - jdk: 13
          - jdk: 14
          - jdk: 15
          - jdk: 16
          - jdk: 17
          - jdk: 17
            ecj: true
          - jdk: 18
          - jdk: 19
          - jdk: 20
          - jdk: 21
          - jdk: 21
            ecj: true
          - jdk: 22
          - jdk: 23
          - jdk: 23
            ecj: true
          - jdk: 24
          - jdk: 25
    name: JDK ${{ matrix.jdk }}${{ matrix.ecj && ' with ECJ' || ''}}
    runs-on: ubuntu-24.04
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@de0fac2e4500dabe0009e67214ff5f5447ce83dd # v6.0.2
      - uses: actions/setup-java@be666c2fcd27ec809703dec50e508c2fdc7f6654 # v5.2.0
        with:
          distribution: 'zulu'
          java-version: |
            ${{ matrix.jdk }}
            17
      - name: 'Generate toolchains.xml'
        env:
          JDK_VERSION: ${{ matrix.jdk }}
          JDK_HOME_VARIABLE_NAME: JAVA_HOME_${{ matrix.jdk }}_X64
        run: |
          echo "
          <toolchains>
            <toolchain>
              <type>jdk</type>
              <provides>
                <id>$JDK_VERSION</id>
                <version>$JDK_VERSION</version>
              </provides>
              <configuration>
                <jdkHome>${!JDK_HOME_VARIABLE_NAME}</jdkHome>
              </configuration>
            </toolchain>
          </toolchains>
          " > toolchains.xml
      - name: 'Build'
        run: |
          ./mvnw -V -B -e --no-transfer-progress \
            verify -Djdk.version=${{ matrix.jdk }} -Dbytecode.version=${{ matrix.jdk }} \
            ${{ matrix.ecj && '-Decj' || ''}} \
            --toolchains=toolchains.xml
  Windows:
    runs-on: windows-2022
    environment: ${{ (github.repository == 'jacoco/jacoco' && github.ref == 'refs/heads/master') && 'snapshot' || null }}
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@de0fac2e4500dabe0009e67214ff5f5447ce83dd # v6.0.2
      - uses: actions/setup-java@be666c2fcd27ec809703dec50e508c2fdc7f6654 # v5.2.0
        with:
          distribution: 'zulu'
          java-version: |
            6
            17
      - name: 'Generate toolchains.xml'
        env:
          JDK_VERSION: 6
          JDK_HOME_VARIABLE_NAME: JAVA_HOME_6_X64
        shell: bash
        run: |
          echo "
          <toolchains>
            <toolchain>
              <type>jdk</type>
              <provides>
                <id>$JDK_VERSION</id>
                <version>$JDK_VERSION</version>
              </provides>
              <configuration>
                <jdkHome>${!JDK_HOME_VARIABLE_NAME}</jdkHome>
              </configuration>
            </toolchain>
          </toolchains>
          " > toolchains.xml
      - name: 'Build'
        shell: bash
        run: |
          ./mvnw -V -B -e --no-transfer-progress \
            verify -Djdk.version=6 -Dbytecode.version=5 \
            -f org.jacoco.build \
            ${{ secrets.SONARQUBE_TOKEN && 'sonar:sonar' || '' }} \
            -Dsonar.scanner.skipJreProvisioning \
            -Dsonar.organization=default \
            -Dsonar.host.url=https://sonarcloud.io \
            --toolchains=toolchains.xml
        env:
          SONAR_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.SONARQUBE_TOKEN }}
      - uses: actions/upload-artifact@bbbca2ddaa5d8feaa63e36b76fdaad77386f024f # v7.0.0
        id: artifact-upload-step
        with:
          name: jacoco
          path: jacoco/target/*.zip
          if-no-files-found: error
  CI:
    needs:
      - Linux
      - Windows
    # without following condition this job can have result "skipped" if needed job was "skipped"
    # auto-merge ignores skipped jobs even if they are required by branch protection rules
    if: ${{ always() }}
    runs-on: ubuntu-24.04
    steps:
      - name: Check results of all needed jobs
        run: |
          R=$(echo "$NEEDS" | jq --compact-output '[.[].result] | unique')
          if [ "$R" = '["success"]' ]; then
            exit 0
          else
            exit 1
          fi
        env:
          NEEDS: ${{ toJSON(needs) }}

ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

# Install system dependencies
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y \
    curl \
    wget \
    git \
    ca-certificates \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

    openjdk-17-jdk-headless \

ENV PATH=$JAVA_HOME/bin:$PATH

WORKDIR /app

# Copy repo
COPY repo/ /app/

# Copy run script
COPY run.sh /run.sh
RUN chmod +x /run.sh

FROM ubuntu:24.04

ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

# Install system dependencies
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y \
    curl \
    wget \
    git \
    ca-certificates \
    apt-transport-https \
    gpg-agent \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Add Eclipse Temurin repository
RUN curl -fsSL https://packages.adoptium.net/artifactory/api/gpg/key/public | apt-key add - && \
    echo "deb https://packages.adoptium.net/artifactory/deb focal main" | tee /etc/apt/sources.list.d/adoptium.list

# Install Java 18 and 17 from Eclipse Temurin
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y \
    temurin-18-jdk \
    temurin-17-jdk \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Set JAVA_HOME environment variables
ENV JAVA_HOME=/usr/lib/jvm/temurin-18-jdk-amd64
ENV JAVA_HOME_18_X64=/usr/lib/jvm/temurin-18-jdk-amd64
ENV JAVA_HOME_17_X64=/usr/lib/jvm/temurin-17-jdk-amd64
ENV PATH=$JAVA_HOME/bin:$PATH

WORKDIR /app

# Copy repo
COPY repo/ /app/

# Copy run script
COPY run.sh /run.sh
RUN chmod +x /run.sh

ENTRYPOINT ["/run.sh"]

tool_use_result.originalFile:
FROM ubuntu:24.04

ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

# Install system dependencies
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y \
    curl \
    wget \
    git \
    ca-certificates \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Install Java 18 and 17 using Azul Zulu
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y \
    openjdk-17-jdk-headless \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Download Zulu JDK 18
RUN curl -fsSL https://cdn.azul.com/zulu/bin/zulu18.0.2.1-ca-jdk18.0.2-linux_x64.tar.gz -o /tmp/zulu18.tar.gz && \
    tar -xzf /tmp/zulu18.tar.gz -C /usr/lib/jvm/ && \
    rm /tmp/zulu18.tar.gz

# Also ensure JDK 17 Zulu is available
RUN curl -fsSL https://cdn.azul.com/zulu/bin/zulu17.0.11-ca-jdk17.0.11-linux_x64.tar.gz -o /tmp/zulu17.tar.gz && \
    mkdir -p /usr/lib/jvm && \
    tar -xzf /tmp/zulu17.tar.gz -C /usr/lib/jvm/ && \
    rm /tmp/zulu17.tar.gz

# Set JAVA_HOME environment variables
ENV JAVA_HOME=/usr/lib/jvm/zulu18.0.2.1-ca-jdk18.0.2-linux_x64
ENV JAVA_HOME_18_X64=/usr/lib/jvm/zulu18.0.2.1-ca-jdk18.0.2-linux_x64
ENV JAVA_HOME_17_X64=/usr/lib/jvm/zulu17.0.11-ca-jdk17.0.11-linux_x64
ENV PATH=$JAVA_HOME/bin:$PATH

WORKDIR /app

# Copy repo
COPY repo/ /app/

# Copy run script
COPY run.sh /run.sh
RUN chmod +x /run.sh

ENTRYPOINT ["/run.sh"]

# Install system dependencies

FROM ubuntu:24.04

ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

# Install system dependencies
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y \
    curl \
    wget \
    git \
    ca-certificates \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Create JVM directory
RUN mkdir -p /usr/lib/jvm

# Download and install Java 18 from Eclipse Temurin
RUN cd /tmp && \
    curl -fsSL -o temurin-18.tar.gz "https://github.com/adoptium/temurin18-binaries/releases/download/jdk-18.0.2.1%2B1/OpenJDK18U-jdk_x64_linux_hotspot_18.0.2.1_1.tar.gz" && \
    tar -xzf temurin-18.tar.gz -C /usr/lib/jvm/ && \
    rm temurin-18.tar.gz

# Download and install Java 17 from Eclipse Temurin
RUN cd /tmp && \
    curl -fsSL -o temurin-17.tar.gz "https://github.com/adoptium/temurin17-binaries/releases/download/jdk-17.0.10%2B7/OpenJDK17U-jdk_x64_linux_hotspot_17.0.10_7.tar.gz" && \
    tar -xzf temurin-17.tar.gz -C /usr/lib/jvm/ && \
    rm temurin-17.tar.gz

# Set JAVA_HOME environment variables
ENV JAVA_HOME=/usr/lib/jvm/jdk-18.0.2.1+1
ENV JAVA_HOME_18_X64=/usr/lib/jvm/jdk-18.0.2.1+1
ENV JAVA_HOME_17_X64=/usr/lib/jvm/jdk-17.0.10+7
ENV PATH=$JAVA_HOME/bin:$PATH

WORKDIR /app

# Copy repo
COPY repo/ /app/

# Copy run script
COPY run.sh /run.sh
RUN chmod +x /run.sh

ENTRYPOINT ["/run.sh"]

FROM ubuntu:24.04

ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

# Install system dependencies and Maven
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y \
    curl \
    wget \
    git \
    ca-certificates \
    maven \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Create JVM directory
RUN mkdir -p /usr/lib/jvm

# Download and install Java 18 from Eclipse Temurin
RUN cd /tmp && \
    curl -fsSL -o temurin-18.tar.gz "https://github.com/adoptium/temurin18-binaries/releases/download/jdk-18.0.2.1%2B1/OpenJDK18U-jdk_x64_linux_hotspot_18.0.2.1_1.tar.gz" && \
    tar -xzf temurin-18.tar.gz -C /usr/lib/jvm/ && \
    rm temurin-18.tar.gz

# Download and install Java 17 from Eclipse Temurin
RUN cd /tmp && \
    curl -fsSL -o temurin-17.tar.gz "https://github.com/adoptium/temurin17-binaries/releases/download/jdk-17.0.10%2B7/OpenJDK17U-jdk_x64_linux_hotspot_17.0.10_7.tar.gz" && \
    tar -xzf temurin-17.tar.gz -C /usr/lib/jvm/ && \
    rm temurin-17.tar.gz

# Set JAVA_HOME environment variables
ENV JAVA_HOME=/usr/lib/jvm/jdk-18.0.2.1+1
ENV JAVA_HOME_18_X64=/usr/lib/jvm/jdk-18.0.2.1+1
ENV JAVA_HOME_17_X64=/usr/lib/jvm/jdk-17.0.10+7
ENV PATH=$JAVA_HOME/bin:$PATH

WORKDIR /app

# Copy repo
COPY repo/ /app/

# Copy run script
COPY run.sh /run.sh
RUN chmod +x /run.sh

ENTRYPOINT ["/run.sh"]

FROM ubuntu:24.04

ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

# Install system dependencies
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y \
    curl \
    wget \
    git \
    ca-certificates \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Create JVM and Maven directories
RUN mkdir -p /usr/lib/jvm /opt/maven

# Download and install Java 18 from Eclipse Temurin
RUN cd /tmp && \
    curl -fsSL -o temurin-18.tar.gz "https://github.com/adoptium/temurin18-binaries/releases/download/jdk-18.0.2.1%2B1/OpenJDK18U-jdk_x64_linux_hotspot_18.0.2.1_1.tar.gz" && \
    tar -xzf temurin-18.tar.gz -C /usr/lib/jvm/ && \
    rm temurin-18.tar.gz

# Download and install Java 17 from Eclipse Temurin
RUN cd /tmp && \
    curl -fsSL -o temurin-17.tar.gz "https://github.com/adoptium/temurin17-binaries/releases/download/jdk-17.0.10%2B7/OpenJDK17U-jdk_x64_linux_hotspot_17.0.10_7.tar.gz" && \
    tar -xzf temurin-17.tar.gz -C /usr/lib/jvm/ && \
    rm temurin-17.tar.gz

# Download and install Maven 3.9.12
RUN cd /tmp && \
    curl -fsSL -o maven-3.9.12.tar.gz "https://archive.apache.org/dist/maven/maven-3/3.9.12/binaries/apache-maven-3.9.12-bin.tar.gz" && \
    tar -xzf maven-3.9.12.tar.gz -C /opt/ && \
    rm maven-3.9.12.tar.gz && \
    ln -s /opt/apache-maven-3.9.12 /opt/maven

# Set JAVA_HOME environment variables
ENV JAVA_HOME=/usr/lib/jvm/jdk-18.0.2.1+1
ENV JAVA_HOME_18_X64=/usr/lib/jvm/jdk-18.0.2.1+1
ENV JAVA_HOME_17_X64=/usr/lib/jvm/jdk-17.0.10+7
ENV PATH=$JAVA_HOME/bin:/opt/maven/bin:$PATH

WORKDIR /app

# Copy repo
COPY repo/ /app/

# Copy run script
COPY run.sh /run.sh
RUN chmod +x /run.sh

ENTRYPOINT ["/run.sh"]
